task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: 15-T-003 X-tran driver roller calibration

abstract.p: You received this trigger on your work list because the out-of-roundness of the X-tran drive roller can be seen in the customer prints.

note.p: In case the customer is not complaining about print quality issue (banding every 11 cm) no extra visit is required for this action. It should be combined with a regular service visit.

section.title: How to act
section.p: Perform the media-step calibration using 21-6-002 Select required printer calibrations [Special Tests] and 21-6-003 Execute selected printer calibrations [Special Tests].
After these tests the out-of-roundness of the X-tran roller has been corrected and the print quality issue will be solved
During engine installation the out-of-roundness of the X-tran drive roller is determined and corrected.
In case this calibration is not done correctly a banding pattern with a period of 11 cm can be visible in the customer print (circumference of the X-tran drive roller).
This calibration can only be done in SDS.
The media calibration which is accessible for the customer only corrects friction on the platen.
